name: Perspective API
description: Perspective API — toxicity and attribute scoring API from Jigsaw/Google for text moderation.

seo.title: Perspective API — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Perspective API: Perspective API — toxicity and attribute scoring API from Jigsaw/Google for text moderation.

when_to_use: Scoring text toxicity and identity attack probability via API
Adding comment quality filters to community platforms with Google's model
Building moderation assistants that flag low-quality comments
Running bulk toxicity scoring on archived comment datasets

pros: Free tier and simple REST API
Good baseline toxicity signal for English
cons: No SLA, can change or deprecate
Text only, no image, video, or audio
review.verdict: Great starting point and research baseline, but risky as core moderation infra without a fallback plan.
review.best_for: Prototypes, research, and moderation MVPs needing free English toxicity scoring.
review.not_for: Production platforms with strict SLAs or multilingual/multimodal needs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
